name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
Grate raw potatoes into water to which lemon juice has been added. Place potatoes in a strainer or cheese cloth and drain off liquid. Drain well.
Beat raw and cooked potatoes with egg, milk, and salt to form a batter.
Using 3 tablespoons oil for each batch, drop batter for 3 or 4 pancakes at a time into hot oil in a large frypan. When firm on the bottom side, loosen edges and turn over gently.
Brown on the other side. Remove from oil using tongs, drain on paper towels, and keep warm.
Continue cooking until all batter is used. Serve immediately.
If served with meat, sprinkle with salt. If served with applesauce, sprinkle with sugar.
